text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the spring Tenno Sho draws near, Tokai Teio
throws herself more and more into training.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: How'd I do? Did I get a faster time?!
choice_data_list: You're guaranteed to win at this rate!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Heck yeah! You just wait—I'll prove I can
dominate in senior year too!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha, you seem hard at work.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ah! Prez!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The Tenno Sho is almost here. How are you
feeling?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm feeling amazing, of course!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I've made it all the way to senior year now, so I
can't go messing up at this point!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Bold as brass, and working hard to achieve
your goals.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
With your classic year over, I look forward to
seeing what kind of performance you'll show us
next.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Then don't be shocked when I blow your
expectations out of the water!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? What's with the crowd?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: My apologies, but I'm in the middle of training.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
All we need is a quick comment on your upcoming
Tenno Sho challenge!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: At least tell us how you're feeling!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I would be happy to during a press conference,
but for now I must take my leave.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I must push myself even harder!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Aah?! Miss McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A group of reporters, it seems... They really
should know better than to meddle in a racer's
training.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: She could've just answered a few questions...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well... there was a time when she would have
readily indulged them for such a simple affair.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now, however, that is not the case. There has
been a monumental shift inside her.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Take note, Teio. When you face her on the track,
victory will not come easily.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Really? I mean, sure, I know she's a tough
opponent and all...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But I'm training just as hard as she is! We're both giving it our all!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
In fact, lemme show you right now just how
powerful I've become!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Keep your eyes on me!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: "Just as hard," huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several days later...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A press conference is held for the spring Tenno
Sho participants.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Though you're in your senior year now, there's a
lot at stake in this race. How do you feel?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I feel like a winner already! My legend is gonna
continue through my senior year!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen is a competitor you'll need to
look out for. What are your thoughts on her?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm not the least bit worried! I feel like I'm the
strongest I've ever been!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter who I'm up against, I'm not
gonna lose! I could run to the ends of the earth!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: Oh! You seem to be brimming with confidence!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Next up is Mejiro McQueen's interview.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: How are you feeling about the Tenno Sho?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I am putting everything I have into avoiding
unsatisfactory results.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I must win.... and I'm prepared to do whatever it
takes.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
You seem to be going all out in your training. Do
you feel like you have a handle on it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I sense that this is the best condition I
could hope for.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm stronger than I've ever been before... I feel as
if I could race to the heavens themselves.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Heeey! Don't be such a copycat!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wh-what do you think you're doing?! This is my interview!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
How're you gonna win if you aim for the heavens,
anyway?! You'd just smash straight into the
ceiling of the starting gate!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's just an expression! I'm not actually going
there!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Well, this is a surprise! We're already seeing
sparks fly between this year's biggest
competitors!

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
This year's spring Tenno Sho is going to be quite
the show!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ugh... So much for this interview.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You're the one who started it by copying me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: In any case, I'm different than who I was before.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
They will all see my ascension. From the earth to
the heavens above...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: From the earth?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The reporters seem excited to see these two clash
before the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their showdown at the spring Tenno Sho is fast
approaching!
